meta.title: A Handful of Bullets: How the Murder of Archduke Franz Ferdi
meta.description: Amb. Husain Haqqani and author Harlan Ullman discuss his new book A Handful of Bullets and ongoing challenges to international order and cooperation. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
